global.openToWorkText: Open to Freelance Gigs · Tech Speaker · Open-Source Contributor

home.title: Kadamanchi Heman
home.name: Heman Kadamanchi
home.tagline: Computer Science Engineering undergraduate specializing in building modern, responsive web apps with React, JavaScript, and Firebase. Deploying production-ready solutions on Vercel while championing AI literacy as a student ambassador.

about.title: About
about.label: My Journey & Vision
about.description:
Hi, I'm Heman — a passionate developer and a first-year B.Tech Computer Science Engineering undergraduate. I specialize in the modern JavaScript ecosystem, focusing on building high-speed React frontends integrated with scalable serverless backends like Firebase.

Beyond writing clean code and diving deep into Data Structures and Algorithms in C, I am deeply invested in ecosystem leadership. As a Google Gemini Student Ambassador and a Senior NSS Volunteer, I regularly lead technical workshops, orchestrate community awareness campaigns, and direct multi-team production strategies for over 100+ peers. I thrive at the intersection of robust engineering and public impact.

highlights.title: Full-Stack Web Dev
highlights.sub: Building semi-ecommerce storefronts, business utility platforms, and interactive digital interfaces using React, JS, and Vercel.

highlights.title: Tech Ambassadorship
highlights.sub: Selected to run AI-driven technical literacy workshops and lead modern software adoption initiatives at the university level.

highlights.title: Community Architect
highlights.sub: Senior NSS volunteer with proven experience coordinating cross-functional teams for large-scale social and technical awareness drives.

highlights.title: Problem Solver
highlights.sub: Actively mastering Data Structures, algorithmic optimization, and version-controlled collaborative environments on GitHub.

items.title: Heman Enterprises Web App
items.description: A semi-ecommerce storefront engineered for a marketing consultancy with custom workflows and direct database links. The platform enables seamless product browsing, enquiry management, and client interaction through a modern, responsive interface. Built with a React frontend for dynamic UI components, Firebase for real-time database operations and authentication, and deployed on Vercel for blazing-fast global edge delivery. Tailwind CSS powers the utility-first responsive design system.

items.title: Chanti Plumbing Services Platform
items.description: A responsive local services discovery application with an optimized mobile-first layout and seamless domain mapping. Designed for a plumbing services business, the platform showcases services, enables customer contact, and provides an intuitive browsing experience across all device sizes. Built with semantic HTML5 for accessibility and SEO, modern CSS3 with custom properties for theming, and vanilla JavaScript for interactive components. Custom domain infrastructure ensures professional branding and reliable hosting.

items.title: API Integration Suite
items.description: A series of 4 independent mini-applications focusing on asynchronous state handling, third-party API data fetching, and dynamic UI updates. Each application demonstrates a different pattern for consuming REST APIs, managing loading and error states, and rendering real-time data in responsive layouts. Built with modern ES6+ JavaScript for clean async/await patterns, REST API integrations for diverse data sources, and CSS Grid for flexible, responsive layouts that adapt to any viewport.

items.title: THE PERIOD OF 2024 Manuscript
items.description: A structural deep dive and curated book project covering historical frameworks, formatted and optimized for digital publishing channels. This manuscript represents a comprehensive content architecture initiative, involving research, editorial structuring, formatting for multiple digital distribution platforms, and optimization for readability across e-reader devices and web-based publishing systems.
